title: Kira and the Missing Carrots
synopsis: When all the carrots disappear from the garden, young detective Kira teams up with her animal friends to solve the mystery. Through clever clues and teamwork, they discover the surprising truth about who took the carrots and why.

pages.text: Kira loved her garden. She had red tomatoes and green beans. But her favorite were the orange carrots. Every morning, Kira would water them. "Good morning, carrots!" she would say. The carrots were getting big and ready to pick.

illustration.description: A young Black girl with curly hair in pigtails, wearing a bright yellow sundress and holding a small watering can. She's smiling warmly at rows of orange carrot tops growing in a neat garden. The garden has rich brown soil with green leafy vegetables. Morning sunlight creates a golden glow over the scene.
illustration.alt: Kira watering her garden carrots in the morning

pages.text: One Tuesday morning, Kira ran to her garden. She wanted to pick some carrots for lunch. But when she looked down, her mouth dropped open. "Oh no!" Kira cried. "Where are all my carrots?"

illustration.description: Kira standing in her garden with her hands on her cheeks, eyes wide with surprise and dismay. The garden rows show empty holes in the soil where carrots used to be, with only scattered green carrot tops left behind. The rich brown earth looks disturbed and messy.
illustration.alt: Kira discovering her carrots are missing from the garden

pages.text: All the carrots were gone! Only little holes were left in the dirt. "This is a mystery," said Kira. "I need to find my carrots!" She put on her detective hat. It was time to look for clues.

illustration.description: Kira wearing a bright blue detective hat and holding a magnifying glass, kneeling beside the empty garden holes. She has a determined expression with sparkling eyes. Around her are scattered carrot tops and disturbed soil. The scene has a sense of adventure and mystery with dramatic lighting.
illustration.alt: Kira putting on her detective hat to solve the carrot mystery

pages.text: Kira looked around her garden very carefully. She found some tiny paw prints in the dirt. "Aha!" she said. "These are clues!" The paw prints were small and round. They led away from the garden toward the big oak tree.

illustration.description: Kira crouched down with her magnifying glass examining small animal paw prints in the brown dirt. The paw prints form a trail leading toward a massive oak tree in the background. Kira looks focused and excited, her detective hat slightly tilted. Bright morning light filters through the tree leaves.
illustration.alt: Kira examining paw prints with her magnifying glass

pages.text: By the oak tree, Kira met her friend Carlos. Carlos was a smart boy with glasses. "Hi Kira!" he said. "What are you doing?" "Someone took all my carrots," Kira explained. "Will you help me solve this mystery?" "Yes!" said Carlos. "I love mysteries!"

illustration.description: Kira talking to Carlos, a friendly Latino boy with round glasses and short dark hair, wearing a green t-shirt. They're standing under the large oak tree with dappled sunlight. Both children look excited and ready for adventure. Carlos is gesturing enthusiastically while Kira points toward her garden.
illustration.alt: Kira and Carlos meeting under the oak tree

pages.text: Carlos looked at the paw prints too. "These look like rabbit prints," he said. Just then, they heard a rustling sound in the bushes. "Did you hear that?" whispered Kira. Something was moving in the green bushes nearby.

illustration.description: Kira and Carlos both looking toward thick green bushes with surprised expressions. Their eyes are wide and alert. The bushes are shaking slightly with mysterious movement. Shadows and bright green leaves create an atmosphere of suspense and curiosity.
illustration.alt: Kira and Carlos hearing mysterious sounds from the bushes

pages.text: Out from the bushes hopped a small brown rabbit. "Don't be scared," said the rabbit. "My name is Rosie." Kira's eyes got very big. "You can talk!" she said. "Of course I can talk," laughed Rosie. "I heard you're looking for missing carrots."

illustration.description: A cute brown rabbit with big expressive eyes and floppy ears, sitting upright and gesturing with her tiny paws. Kira and Carlos look amazed and delighted, their mouths open in wonder. The scene has a magical quality with sparkles of light around Rosie. Warm, friendly colors throughout.
illustration.alt: Rosie the rabbit introducing herself to amazed Kira and Carlos

pages.text: "Did you take my carrots?" asked Kira. "Not me!" said Rosie. "But I can help you find them. I know all the animals in this neighborhood." A squirrel named Sam jumped down from the oak tree. "I want to help too!" he chattered excitedly.

illustration.description: A fluffy gray squirrel with a bushy tail and bright alert eyes perched on a tree branch above the group. Rosie the rabbit sits below with Kira and Carlos. All characters look friendly and eager. The oak tree's thick trunk and leafy branches frame the scene with dappled sunlight filtering through.
illustration.alt: Sam the squirrel joining the group from the oak tree

pages.text: Now Kira had a whole team of detectives! "Let's follow the paw prints," she said. The four friends walked together through the yard. The trail led them past the flower bed, around the fence, and toward the neighbor's yard.

illustration.description: Kira, Carlos, Rosie the rabbit, and Sam the squirrel walking in a line following a trail. They look like determined detectives on a mission. The path winds through a colorful flower garden with pink and purple blooms, past a white picket fence. The scene feels adventurous and teamwork-oriented.
illustration.alt: The detective team following the trail through the yard

pages.text: The trail led to Mrs. Chen's backyard. Mrs. Chen was watering her flowers. "Hello, children," she said with a smile. "What brings you here today?" "We're solving a mystery," explained Kira. "Someone took all my carrots!"

illustration.description: A kind elderly Asian woman with silver hair in a neat bun, wearing a purple gardening apron and holding a watering can. She's surrounded by beautiful blooming flowers in various colors. Kira, Carlos, and their animal friends approach her with respectful, curious expressions. The garden setting is lush and welcoming.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Chen greeting the detective team in her flower garden

pages.text: Mrs. Chen looked worried. "Oh my! That's terrible," she said. "I haven't seen any carrots, but I did notice something strange. There were lots of little animals running around very early this morning. They looked very busy."

illustration.description: Mrs. Chen with a thoughtful expression, touching her chin as she remembers. In the background, faint shadowy figures of small animals can be seen moving around, suggesting the memory of the morning scene. The lighting suggests early dawn with soft, misty colors.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Chen remembering the busy animals from early morning

pages.text: "Which way did they go?" asked Carlos. Mrs. Chen pointed toward the park. "They all went that way," she said. "Good luck with your mystery!" The friends thanked Mrs. Chen and headed toward the park. What would they find there?

illustration.description: Mrs. Chen pointing toward a park visible in the distance with trees and playground equipment. The detective team looks determined and excited, ready to continue their adventure. The park looks inviting with green grass and colorful play structures. Afternoon sunlight creates long shadows.
illustration.alt: Mrs. Chen pointing the detective team toward the park

pages.text: At the park, they found a big group of animals. There were rabbits, squirrels, and even a raccoon! In the middle of the group were Kira's missing carrots! "There they are!" shouted Kira. But then she saw something that made her stop.

illustration.description: A clearing in the park with many woodland animals - rabbits, squirrels, a raccoon, and birds - gathered around Kira's orange carrots arranged in the center. The animals look friendly but nervous. Kira and her friends stand at the edge of the clearing with surprised expressions. Dappled forest light creates a magical atmosphere.
illustration.alt: The detective team discovering the animals with the missing carrots

pages.text: One little rabbit had a hurt paw. He looked very sad and hungry. "We're sorry we took your carrots," said an old rabbit. "But Baby Benny is hurt. He can't hop to find food. We were trying to help him get better."

illustration.description: A tiny young rabbit with a bandaged paw sitting sadly while other animals gather protectively around him. An elderly rabbit with wise, kind eyes speaks to Kira. The scene conveys compassion and understanding, with soft, warm colors. Baby Benny looks small and vulnerable but hopeful.
illustration.alt: The animals explaining why they took the carrots to help injured Baby Benny

pages.text: Kira felt sorry for Baby Benny. "You should have asked me," she said gently. "I would have shared my carrots!" She knelt down by the little rabbit. "Let's help Benny together. And next time, just ask!" All the animals smiled. "Thank you, Kira," they said. "You're very kind."

illustration.description: Kira kneeling beside Baby Benny with a warm, caring smile, gently offering him a carrot. All the woodland animals look relieved and grateful. Carlos, Rosie, and Sam beam with happiness. The scene radiates kindness, friendship, and problem-solving. Golden afternoon light makes everything feel warm and resolved.
illustration.alt: Kira sharing her carrots with Baby Benny and solving the mystery with kindness

pages.text: From that day on, Kira always grew extra carrots to share. Baby Benny's paw got better, and he became one of Kira's best friends. The mystery was solved, and everyone was happy. "Being a detective is fun," said Kira. "But being kind is even better!"

illustration.description: Kira in her thriving garden with Baby Benny (now healthy) and all her new animal friends helping tend the vegetables. The garden is abundant with carrots and other vegetables. Everyone looks joyful and content. The scene shows the happy ending with friendship, sharing, and community working together.
illustration.alt: Kira and all her friends working together in the flourishing garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What was missing from Kira's garden?
questions.explanation: All of Kira's carrots were missing from her garden, which started the mystery!

questions.question: Who was the first friend to help Kira solve the mystery?
questions.explanation: Carlos was the first friend Kira met who agreed to help solve the carrot mystery.

questions.question: What clues did Kira find in her garden?
questions.explanation: Kira found small, round paw prints in the dirt that led away from her garden.

questions.question: Why did the animals take the carrots?
choices: To help Baby Benny who was hurt
questions.explanation: The animals took the carrots to help Baby Benny, a little rabbit with a hurt paw who couldn't find food.

questions.question: How did Kira solve the problem?
choices: She shared her carrots and asked them to ask next time
questions.explanation: Kira kindly shared her carrots with the animals and asked them to ask for help next time instead of taking them.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: Kira loved her ___1___. Every morning, she would ___2___ them. But one day, all her carrots were ___3___! She found tiny ___4___ prints in the dirt. Kira put on her detective ___5___ to solve the mystery.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: The animals took the carrots to help Baby ___1___, who had a hurt ___2___. Kira felt ___3___ for the little rabbit. She decided to ___4___ her carrots. From that day on, all the ___5___ were friends.
